BlobStorageAsyncClient - Interface in michaelcirkl.ubsa
Asynchronous provider-neutral client for bucket and blob operations.
BlobStorageClientFactory - Class in michaelcirkl.ubsa
Factory for adapting provider SDK clients to the UBSA sync or async interfaces.
BlobStorageSyncClient - Interface in michaelcirkl.ubsa
Synchronous provider-neutral client for bucket and blob operations.
BlobWriteOptions - Class in michaelcirkl.ubsa.client.streaming
Optional metadata and content settings applied when creating or uploading a blob using streaming.
